# End-to-End Case Study {#case-study}

:::cdi-message
- **ID:** AI-011
- **Type:** Case Study
- **Audience:** Learners ready to combine the workflow
- **Theme:** A complete AI system connects framing, prompting, evaluation, and reporting
:::


This case study uses a simple AI task log.

The goal is not to depend on any specific AI provider.

The goal is to show how an AI workflow can be documented, evaluated, and improved.

## Run the Case Study

```bash
bash scripts/bash/01-create-example-ai-task-log.sh
python scripts/python/02-evaluate-ai-output-quality.py data/example/ai-task-log.csv data/results
python scripts/python/03-build-prompt-registry.py data/example/ai-task-log.csv data/results
Rscript scripts/R/04-plot-evaluation-summary.R data/results/ai-evaluation-summary.csv data/reports
quarto render
```
